ch01_01.title: First Contact
ch01_01.description: Make the security terminal display the message 'Hello, World!' using the print() function.

ch01_02.title: Cover Identity
ch01_02.description: Create a variable called 'codename' and assign it your operative name as a string. Then print it.

ch01_03.title: Cracking Numbers
ch01_03.description: The security lock code is the result of a calculation. Compute and print the answer using Python math operators.
